response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. He does not have the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience on the Windows platform, nor does he possess the necessary domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with strong modern development practices including TDD and CI/CD.
Some exposure to the investment domain through his tenure at RIDE Capital.
Possesses several optional skills including Java development, scripting languages, and CI/CD pipeline knowledge.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience, showing only 7 months of C/C++ work in 2014-2015.
No evidence of specialized Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking domain expertise.
Missing required experience with Windows platform development and enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
